languages.text: "Не могу быть уверенным в том, что время и место выбраны удачно, Вольный Торговец". {n}Манипулус с важным видом качает головой.{/n} "Разве готовы миряне воспринять учение Биологис здесь и сейчас? Посмотрите на них. Мудрость постигается в размышлении; их же мысли заняты совершенно иным".

"I am not sure this time and place are well-chosen, Rogue Trader." {n}The Manipulus solemnly shakes his head.{/n} "Are the laity even ready to absorb the teachings of the Biologis in this place and hour? Gaze upon them. Wisdom is attained in contemplation; whereas their minds are consumed by matters of an utterly different sort."
languages.original_text: "Не могу быть уверенным в том, что время и место выбраны удачно, Вольный Торговец". {n}Манипулус с важным видом качает головой.{/n} "Разве готовы миряне воспринять учение Биологис здесь и сейчас? Посмотрите на них. Мудрость постигается в размышлении; их же мысли заняты совершенно иным".

Gaze upon them. Wisdom is attained in contemplation; whereas their minds are consumed by completely foreign matters."

Gaze upon them. Wisdom is attained in contemplation; whereas their minds are consumed by completely foreign matters."

Gaze upon them. Wisdom is attained in contemplation; whereas their minds are consumed by matters of an utterly different sort."

languages.text: «No sé si el momento y el lugar son los adecuados, Comerciante Independiente». {n}El manipulus niega solemnemente con la cabeza.{/n} «¿Están los laicos listos para aceptar las enseñanzas del Biologis aquí y ahora? Mírelos. La sabiduría se obtiene durante la contemplación, mientras que sus mentes están ocupadas por asuntos de una índole completamente diferente».
languages.original_text: "I am not sure this time and place are well-chosen, Rogue Trader." {n}The Manipulus solemnly shakes his head.{/n} "Are the laity even ready to absorb the teachings of the Biologis in this place and hour? Gaze upon them. Wisdom is attained in contemplation; whereas their minds are consumed by matters of an utterly different sort."

traits.locale_text: «No sé si el momento y el lugar son los adecuados, Comerciante Independiente». {n}El manipulus niega solemnemente con la cabeza.{/n} «¿Están los laicos listos para aceptar las enseñanzas del Biologis aquí y ahora? Mírelos. La sabiduría se obtiene durante la contemplación, mientras que sus mentes están ocupadas por asuntos de una índole completamente diferente».

languages.text: “我不确定当前这个时间地点是否合适，行商浪人。”{n}操纵者严肃地摇了摇头。{/n}“这些教外人士真的准备好在此时此地接受生物教义了吗？看看他们。智慧在沉思中诞生；而他们的心智此刻正被全然不同的事情所占据。”
languages.original_text: "I am not sure this time and place are well-chosen, Rogue Trader." {n}The Manipulus solemnly shakes his head.{/n} "Are the laity even ready to absorb the teachings of the Biologis in this place and hour? Gaze upon them. Wisdom is attained in contemplation; whereas their minds are consumed by matters of an utterly different sort."

traits.locale_text: “我不确定当前这个时间地点是否合适，行商浪人。”{n}操纵者严肃地摇了摇头。{/n}“这些教外人士真的准备好在此时此地接受生物教义了吗？看看他们。智慧在沉思中诞生；而他们的心智此刻正被全然不同的事情所占据。”

languages.text: "Ich weiß nicht, ob Zeit und Ort klug gewählt sind, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}." {n}Der Manipulus schüttelt feierlich den Kopf.{/n} "Sind die Laien überhaupt bereit, die Lehren des Biologis an diesem Ort und zu dieser Stunde zu absorbieren? Seht sie Euch an. Weisheit entsteht durch Kontemplation, aber sie haben gänzlich andere Dinge im Kopf ..."
languages.original_text: "I am not sure this time and place are well-chosen, Rogue Trader." {n}The Manipulus solemnly shakes his head.{/n} "Are the laity even ready to absorb the teachings of the Biologis in this place and hour? Gaze upon them. Wisdom is attained in contemplation; whereas their minds are consumed by matters of an utterly different sort."

traits.locale_text: "Ich weiß nicht, ob Zeit und Ort klug gewählt sind, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}." {n}Der Manipulus schüttelt feierlich den Kopf.{/n} "Sind die Laien überhaupt bereit, die Lehren des Biologis an diesem Ort und zu dieser Stunde zu absorbieren? Seht sie Euch an. Weisheit entsteht durch Kontemplation, aber sie haben gänzlich andere Dinge im Kopf ..."

languages.text: « Je ne suis pas sûr que les circonstances s'y prêtent, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}, {n}répond le manipulus en secouant la tête avec le plus grand sérieux.{/n} Les profanes ici rassemblés sont-ils seulement prêts à assimiler les enseignements du Magos Biologis ? Regardez-les... C'est par la contemplation qu'on atteint la sagesse, et leurs esprits sont accaparés par des affaires d'une tout autre nature. »
languages.original_text: "I am not sure this time and place are well-chosen, Rogue Trader." {n}The Manipulus solemnly shakes his head.{/n} "Are the laity even ready to absorb the teachings of the Biologis in this place and hour? Gaze upon them. Wisdom is attained in contemplation; whereas their minds are consumed by matters of an utterly different sort."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne suis pas sûr que les circonstances s'y prêtent, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}, {n}répond le manipulus en secouant la tête avec le plus grand sérieux.{/n} Les profanes ici rassemblés sont-ils seulement prêts à assimiler les enseignements du Magos Biologis ? Regardez-les... C'est par la contemplation qu'on atteint la sagesse, et leurs esprits sont accaparés par des affaires d'une tout autre nature. »

languages.text: "Bu zaman ve mekânın iyi seçildiğinden emin değilim Hür Tacir." {n}Manipülus, ağırbaşlılıkla başını sallıyor.{/n} "Ruhban dışı sınıf, bu mekânda ve saatte Biyologis'in öğretilerini özümsemeye hazır mı ki? Şunlara bir bakın. Bilgeliğe tefekkürle ulaşılır. Oysa onların zihinleri tamamen farklı türden meselelerle meşgul."
languages.original_text: "I am not sure this time and place are well-chosen, Rogue Trader." {n}The Manipulus solemnly shakes his head.{/n} "Are the laity even ready to absorb the teachings of the Biologis in this place and hour? Gaze upon them. Wisdom is attained in contemplation; whereas their minds are consumed by matters of an utterly different sort."

traits.locale_text: "Bu zaman ve mekânın iyi seçildiğinden emin değilim Hür Tacir." {n}Manipülus, ağırbaşlılıkla başını sallıyor.{/n} "Ruhban dışı sınıf, bu mekânda ve saatte Biyologis'in öğretilerini özümsemeye hazır mı ki? Şunlara bir bakın. Bilgeliğe tefekkürle ulaşılır. Oysa onların zihinleri tamamen farklı türden meselelerle meşgul."

languages.text: 「この時とこの場所は、よく選ばれたものではないかもしれませんね、ローグトレーダー。」{n}マニピュラスは、重々しく頭を振る。{/n}「この時とこの場所で、一般の人々が生物学者の教えを吸収する準備ができているでしょうか。彼らを見なさい。知恵は瞑想によって得られるものです。しかし、彼らの心は、全く異なる問題に奪われています。」
languages.original_text: "I am not sure this time and place are well-chosen, Rogue Trader." {n}The Manipulus solemnly shakes his head.{/n} "Are the laity even ready to absorb the teachings of the Biologis in this place and hour? Gaze upon them. Wisdom is attained in contemplation; whereas their minds are consumed by matters of an utterly different sort."

traits.locale_text: 「この時とこの場所は、よく選ばれたものではないかもしれませんね、ローグトレーダー。」{n}マニピュラスは、重々しく頭を振る。{/n}「この時とこの場所で、一般の人々が生物学者の教えを吸収する準備ができているでしょうか。彼らを見なさい。知恵は瞑想によって得られるものです。しかし、彼らの心は、全く異なる問題に奪われています。」
